creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Wed May 15 01:24:16 2013
New Revision: 318213
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318213

Log:
  - Fix build with amd64
  
  PR:		178583
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Added:
  head/science/avogadro/files/patch-libavogadro__src__extensions__crystallorgraphy__spglib__CMakeLists.txt   (contents, props changed)
  head/science/avogadro/files/patch-libavogadro__src__extensions__swcntbuilder__tubegen__CMakeLists.txt   (contents, props changed)

Added: head/science/avogadro/files/patch-libavogadro__src__extensions__crystallorgraphy__spglib__CMakeLists.txt
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/science/avogadro/files/patch-libavogadro__src__extensions__crystallorgraphy__spglib__CMakeLists.txt	Wed May 15 01:24:16 2013	(r318213)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- libavogadro/src/extensions/crystallography/spglib/CMakeLists.txt.orig
++++ libavogadro/src/extensions/crystallography/spglib/CMakeLists.txt
+@@ -20,6 +20,6 @@
+ set_target_properties(spglib PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS "-w")
+ 
+ # Set -fPIC on x86_64
+-if("${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}" STREQUAL "x86_64")
++if(NOT "${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}" MATCHES "i386")
+   set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} -fPIC"  )
+ endif()

Added: head/science/avogadro/files/patch-libavogadro__src__extensions__swcntbuilder__tubegen__CMakeLists.txt
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/science/avogadro/files/patch-libavogadro__src__extensions__swcntbuilder__tubegen__CMakeLists.txt	Wed May 15 01:24:16 2013	(r318213)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- libavogadro/src/extensions/swcntbuilder/tubegen/CMakeLists.txt.orig
++++ libavogadro/src/extensions/swcntbuilder/tubegen/CMakeLists.txt
+@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@
+ set_target_properties(tubegen PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS "-w")
+ 
+ # Set -fPIC on x86_64
+-if("${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}" STREQUAL "x86_64")
++if(NOT "${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}" MATCHES "i386")
+   set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} -fPIC"  )
+   set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -fPIC"  )
+ endif()
